title: Employee Assistance Services: Our Programs - Canada.ca
content:
## Employee Assistance Services: Our programs
- Employee Assistance Program
- For service providers
- Psychosocial response and extended counselling
- Specialized       Organizational Services
- Alternative dispute resolution services
- Occupational and       critical incident stress management

## Psychosocial  response and extended counselling
Our team supports federal responders and employees:
- affected by critical incidents
- during major international events
- under prolonged stress
To provide these services, we work with a network of mental  health professionals who specialize in supporting responders.
We also coordinate extended counselling services to address  specific organizational needs. We provide these services on a cost-recovery  basis.

## Specialized  Organizational Services
We offer specialized organizational services to meet the  workplace wellness and mental health needs of employees, managers, and  executives of the federal public service.
These services are available to all federal departments and  agencies across Canada, and operate on a cost-recovery basis. They include:
- customized training and workshops on topics such  as: change  management civility  and respect in the workplace unconscious  bias workplace  transitions stress  management, burnout prevention and resiliency career  planning, leadership skills and coaching
- civility  and respect in the workplace
- workplace  transitions
- stress  management, burnout prevention and resiliency
- career  planning, leadership skills and coaching
- evidence-based and off-the-shelf workshops: Shift Your Mind The Working Mind Mental  Health First Aid
- Mental  Health First Aid
- decompression programs that are: trauma-informed  and evidence-based designed  to support the well-being of those who have experienced significant workplace  stress
- trauma-informed  and evidence-based
- designed  to support the well-being of those who have experienced significant workplace  stress
- workplace health assessments
- workplace restoration services
- grief and loss support, both in-person and  virtually, with flexible scheduling
Contact  Specialized Organizational Services

## Alternative  dispute resolution services
We provide support and resolution services that help  managers and employees address workplace challenges in a collaborative,  constructive and voluntary manner. Services are offered on a cost-recovery  basis.

### Informal  Conflict Management Services
Confidential and impartial advice for employees and managers  about informal conflict resolution, including:
- conflict       coaching
- facilitated       discussion
- group process, which is a guided session where  participants: identify  issues establish  an action plan reach  resolution
- establish  an action plan
Contact  Alternative dispute resolution services

### Prevention of harassment  and violence in the workplace
Advice and consultation for prevention, as well as  resolution and restoration after workplace harassment or violence, including:
- workplace risk assessments
- administrative investigations
- designated recipient services
- workplace harassment and violence investigations
Contact  Prevention of harassment and violence in the workplace
A confidential program that offers a safe space to discuss  workplace issues that contribute to a challenging work environment. Services  include:
- referrals and follow-ups
- needs assessments by service coordinators
- information and guidance on resolution options
Note: This program is limited to federal organizations that have or want to set up a contract with Health Canada’s EAS to provide Ombuds services.
Contact  Ombuds services

## Occupational and  critical incident stress management
Supports Indigenous Services Canada nurses and band-employed  nurses working in:
- First Nations, Inuit and Métis communities
- cumulative stress coaching
- critical incident services, such as:
- preventing occupational stress injuries
- peer-assistance line and support calls
Contact  Occupational and critical incident stress management
